# tahoma2d-mcp

Context about the Tahoma2D animation software and MCP project for AI assistants.

## What is Tahoma2D?
- Active open-source fork of OpenToonz (BSD license)
- Same C++/Qt codebase as Studio Ghibli's Toonz
- Used for: Princess Mononoke, Spirited Away, Howl's Moving Castle, Futurama, Steven Universe
- Last release: May 2026 (v1.6.1)
- Website: https://tahoma2d.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/tahoma2d/tahoma2d

## tahoma2d-mcp Project
- FastMCP 3.2 server bridging to Tahoma2D via ECMAScript automation
- 8 portmanteau MCP tools for animation production
- Ports: 11012 (frontend), 11013 (backend)
- Full Tauri 2.0 desktop wrapper available
